title: Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam
tagline: Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Ranganathaswamy Temple or Arulmigu Ranganathar Thirukovil is a Hindu temple dedicated to Ranganathar (a form of Vishnu) and his consort Ranganayaki (a form of Lakshmi).
overview.description: The Ranganathaswamy Temple or Arulmigu Ranganathar Thirukovil is a Hindu temple dedicated to Ranganathar (a form of Vishnu) and his consort Ranganayaki (a form of Lakshmi). The temple is located in Srirangam, Tiruchirapalli, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Tamil architectural style, the temple is glorified by the Tamil poet-saints called the Alvars in their canon, the Naalayira Divya Prabhandam, and has the unique distinction of being the foremost among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to the god Vishnu. The Srirangam temple stands as the largest functioning religious complex in the world

topPlaces.name: Srirangam marriage hall fire
topPlaces.description: The 2004 Srirangam marriage hall fire was a fire that happened on 23 January 2004 during a Hindu wedding at Padmapriya Marriage Hall in Srirangam, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A day after the accident, there were 42 victims, but a total of 64 people, including the groom, were killed overall and 33 others were injured in the fire.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam Island
topPlaces.description: Srirangam Island is a river island in the city of Tiruchirappalli, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The island is formed by the Kaveri and Kollidam Rivers.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam division
topPlaces.description: Srirangam division is a new revenue division, with Srirangam as its headquarters, became functional in Tiruchirappalli district with Chief Minister Jayalalithaa. This will be the fourth revenue division in the district after Tiruchi, Lalgudi, and Musiri.

topPlaces.name: Srirangam
topPlaces.description: Srirangam is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. A river island, Srirangam is bounded by the Kaveri River on one side and its distributary Kollidam on the other side.

topPlaces.name: Jambukeswarar Temple, Thiruvanaikaval
topPlaces.description: Jambukeswarar Temple, Thiruvanaikaval (also Thiruvanaikal, Jambukeswaram) is a temple of Shiva in Tiruchirapalli district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the five major Shiva Temples of Tamil Nadu representing the Mahābhūta or five elements; this temple represents the element of water, or neer in Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvanaikaval
topPlaces.description: Thiruvanaikaval Paadal Petra Sthalam (திருவனைகோவில்) or Thiruvanaikovil is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated on the northern banks of the Kaveri river, on the Srirangam Island.

topPlaces.name: Raghavendrapuram
topPlaces.description: Raghavendrapuram is the name of a place in India. There are at least two villages with the same name, one in Tamil Nadu and the other in Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Bikshandarkoil
topPlaces.description: Bikshandarkoil, or Pichandarkovil, is a Neighborhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in the heart of the city .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (7 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam?
faq.a: Stays in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Srirangam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Srirangam marriage hall fire, Srirangam Island, Srirangam division, Srirangam, Jambukeswarar Temple, Thiruvanaikaval.
